Node.help: ATM Plugin configures ATM settings on ATM ports.

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents firstVpi for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: firstVpi
PropertyInt.description: First ATM VPI value to use.

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents vpiStep for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: vpiStep

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents vpiCount for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: vpiCount

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents firstVci for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: firstVci
PropertyInt.description: First ATM VCI value to use

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents vciStep for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: vciStep

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents vciCount for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: vciCount

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents addressPerVci for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: addressPerVci

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents addressPerVpi for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: addressPerVpi

PropertyInt.obsolete: PvcRange list must be used instead. Represents atmPvcIncrMode for the first element in PvcRange list
PropertyInt.name: atmPvcIncrMode

PropertyString.obsolete: AtmRange list must be used instead. Represents encapsulation for the first element in AtmRange list
PropertyString.name: encapsulation
PropertyString.description: The type of ATM transport encapsulation

PropertyString.obsolete: AtmRange list must be used instead. Represents mac for the first element in AtmRange list
PropertyString.name: mac
PropertyString.description: base value used when the plugin creates a mac addresses.

PropertyString.obsolete: AtmRange list must be used instead. Represents incrementBy for the first element in AtmRange list
PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.description: Incrementor used when the plugin creates a range of macs.

PropertyBoolean.name: enabled
PropertyBoolean.description: True enables the plugin, false disables the plugin.

PropertyString.name: atmInterfaceType
PropertyString.description: May take the following values: kUNI, kNNI

PropertyBoolean.name: cosetEnable
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable Coset(header error correction) if true, disable if false.

PropertyString.name: fillerCell
PropertyString.description: May take the following values: kUnassigned, kIdle

PropertyBoolean.name: atmPatternMatching
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable atm Pattern matching if true, disable if false.

PropertyInt.name: reassemblyTimeout
PropertyInt.description: Value of reassembly timeout in seconds.

PropertyNodeList.name: atmRangeList
PropertyNodeList.help: The list of atm ranges. See the AtmRange for details.

PropertyNodeList.name: pvcRangeList
PropertyNodeList.help: The list of pvc ranges. See the PvcRange for details.
